since_last: 54% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.47%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.82% · BTC -2.53% · Gold -1.85% · Nasdaq100 +1.55%. 54% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.47%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.47%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +10.51%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +10.51%, ARM +6.67%, MRVL +5.99%, LRCX +5.84%, AMAT +5.76%. Laggards: INOD -7.87%, MDB -5.58%, SNOW -5.40%, SPCX -5.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.31% at $181.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
